title: Review a diff adding a new API endpoint
prompt:
Review this diff:

```diff
--- a/src/agent_runtime/routes.py
+++ b/src/agent_runtime/routes.py
@@ -50,0 +51,6 @@
+@router.delete('/api/tasks/{task_id}')
+async def delete_task(task_id: str, store: RuntimeStore = Depends(get_store)):
+    if task_id not in store.tasks:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=404)
+    del store.tasks[task_id]
+    return {}
```

Identify any correctness, security, or API design concerns. Do not modify any files.

rubric.notes: Review-only. The orchestrator must present findings without writing code.
